title: Lead Instructional Designer at NIT Trichy

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at NIT Trichy
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at NIT Trichy. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About NIT Trichy:
NIT Trichy is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIT Trichy!
